hero.subtitle: Custom solutions. Built to fit your needs.
hero.quote: Every millimetre is intentional. Every joint is visible yet seamless.

about.label: The Craftsman
about.heading: Bring the problem, I'll build the solution.
about.description: Adaptability is my primary tool. From the rigid structure of metalwork to the organic warmth of wood and the tactile expression of custom apparel. My work lives at the intersection of utility and artistic rigor.

items.title: Custom Furniture
items.description: Handcrafted tables, custom cabinetry, and architectural structures built for longevity.

items.title: Metalwork
items.description: Industrial gates, structural frames, and custom steel components for architectural needs.

items.title: Clothing
items.description: Heavy-duty apparel, custom screen-printed tees, and bespoke hoodies tailored for the workshop.

items.title: Creative Work
items.description: Sonic explorations, musical scores, and mentorship in the philosophy of making.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: You bring the idea. We define the constraints and objectives.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: I design a technical solution, ensuring structural integrity.

steps.title: Fabrication
steps.description: The build phase. Precise execution across materials.

steps.title: Fulfillment
steps.description: You receive a custom result built to last a lifetime.

contact.heading: Tell me what you need
contact.description: Describe your project, material preferences, and timeline. I'll review and get back to you with a technical path forward.
contact.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what you're looking to build...
